job_title: Full-stack Engineer, Data Platform - Experimentation & Evaluation
job_nlp_title: Full-stack Engineer, Data Platform - Experimentation & Evaluation
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
must_have_quals: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or related fields, Development experience in JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Go, C++, or related languages, Strong experience in architecting and implementing modern consumer-facing web applications, Experience of driving collaboration across cross-functional teams on delivering shared goals, Strong communication and teamwork skills
preferred_quals: Strong product sense, with experience driving user-facing products/features from 0 to 1, Experience with large-scale data applications is a plus, Curiosity towards new technologies and entrepreneurship
core_responsibilities: Design and implement reliable, scalable, robust and extensible big data systems that support core products and business, Establish solid design and best engineering practice for engineers as well as non-technical people, Build world-class frontends, which combine usability, accessibility, elegance, performance, and maintainability
job_summary: TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. The role involves building and optimizing a large data platform to enhance A/B testing capabilities, directly impacting core products and user experience.
